title: Sigma 6054137 Art. Tile Cutter 2 G
description: The Sigma 2G Tile Cutter is a manual tile cutter that has been designed to cut a range of tiles up to 15mm thick. The tungsten carbide scoring wheels on the Sigma 2G Tile Cutter scores the tile by pulling the breaker along the surface of the tile. Moving the breaker handle upwards quickly breaks the tile while the sprung-loaded base plates absorb the impact. The Sigma 2G Tile Cutter has a swivelling measurement bar which rotates through 45 degrees in both directions with a scale to accurately determine the angle of cut. The rapid positioning button on this Sigma manual Tile Cutter makes the main angles commonly used immediately available. This is a compact manual tile cutter and weighs just 2.6kg making it easy to store and transport. The maximum straight cut length of this Sigma 2G tile cutter is 37cm and diagonal cuts can be made on tiles measuring up to 26x26cm. Sigma 2G Tile Cutters have a breaking strength of 600kg.
breadCrumbs: DIY & Tools > Power, Garden & Hand Tools > Power Tools > Tile Cutters
